description_long: This object is a stylized, black aircraft with a bat-like silhouette, mounted on a circular base featuring a gold and black Batman emblem. The airplane has sharply swept wings with pointed tips and a central fuselage that tapers to a narrow nose, evoking the appearance of the Batwing from the Batman franchise. The cockpit is centrally located and enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy, flanked by angular engine nacelles or intakes. The wings are broad and curve outward, with additional winglets or extensions that enhance the bat motif. The tail section is minimal, with no visible vertical stabilizer, contributing to the sleek, futuristic look. The base is thick and sturdy, providing a strong visual contrast to the glossy, dark aircraft above.
description: A sleek, black bat-shaped airplane with swept wings and a blue-tinted cockpit, mounted on a circular base with a gold Batman emblem.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bat-like silhouette, central cockpit, and wide, curved wings over the Batman emblem base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sharply swept wings, blue-tinted canopy, and the layered, aerodynamic profile of the aircraft.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engine nacelles, minimal tail section, and the full spread of the bat-shaped wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the angular wing extensions and the sleek, streamlined body above the emblem base.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, bat-shaped wings and pronounced wing extensions; no visible dihedral or anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the main fuselage, with intakes visible on either side of the cockpit.
attribute_tail_design: Minimal tail with no visible vertical stabilizer; design is integrated into the bat-like wing structure.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Central, forward-mounted enclosed cockpit with a single blue-tinted canopy.
